project.description: The name of the project to add the sub-path export to.

subpath.description: The sub-path name (e.g. 'utils'). Used as './utils' in the exports map and to derive config/api-extractor.utils.json.
subpath.x-prompt: What is the export sub-path name (e.g. 'utils')?

sourceEntrypoint.description: Path of the source entrypoint relative to src/ (defaults to '{subpath}/index.ts').

enableApiReport.description: Whether to generate an api.md report for this sub-path entry.
